title: Microtrichomanes johorense
taxonomy: Microtrichomanes johorense is a species of fern in the family Polypodiaceae. It is a type of epiphytic fern, which means it grows on other plants such as trees. The classification of Microtrichomanes johorense places it within the kingdom Plantae, phylum Pteridophyta, and class Polypodiopsida. This classification is further divided into order Polypodiales, family Polypodiaceae, genus Microtrichomanes, and species M. johorense. The specific classification of Microtrichomanes johorense is a reflection of its unique characteristics and evolutionary relationships within the plant kingdom.
